content.full_text:
State of California

Memorandum

To: File

Date: Feb. 11, 1983
No. T-83-038

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
        Janis Shank McLean

Subject: Telephone Advice
        Janet Gladfelter, Stockton City Attorney

The same penalties that apply to other violations of the PRA apply to violations of Government Code Section 84308.
